filesystem.description: File system access for syncing agents, skills, and workflow protocols across projects

git.description: Git operations for version management, tagging releases, and commit history inspection

python.description: Python environment inspection for development, debugging, and dependency management

notes.setup: MCP servers provide Copilot CLI with advanced capabilities for this project. Install the necessary MCP server packages if not already available.
notes.filesystem: Enables efficient syncing of agents.md files, skills directories, and workflow protocols to projects during 'arms init'.
notes.git: Supports version control operations like git tag, git push, and commit verification essential for ARMS release workflow.
notes.python: Helps with understanding the codebase structure, debugging init_arms.py, and verifying package builds.
